title: hibbertia oenotheroides
intro: Hibbertia oenotheroides, also known as Guinea flower, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Hibbertia oenotheroides is often prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or taken internally under medical supervision.
